title: diuris behrii subsp. multilineata
intro: Diuris behrii subsp. multilineata, also known as the spotted donkey orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to Western Australia. Diuris behrii subsp. multilineata has been used traditionally by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which may provide health benefits including wound healing and immune system support.
